sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26807" key="diqurambe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῑθῠραμβ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n26807.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sing a dithyramb,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0583.tlg001:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philoch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
